prompt: Investigate the finance tenant login failures.

final_response.suspected_root_cause: Authentication traffic is failing because the identity-provider client cannot complete token exchange after secret rotation.
next_steps: Verify the active identity-provider client secret and refresh token configuration.
Unlock affected finance accounts after the auth client is healthy again.
final_response.manager_summary: Finance users are locked out because the authentication client is failing token validation and exchange flows.
